name: Panu Saukko
title: Endpoint management is what I do
bio:
I work for ProTrainIT Oy with many hats: trainer, consultant & CEO. 

I have been a MCT since 1995. Currently I mostly consult and train about Microsoft's endpoint management products (Intune, ConfigMgr, Windows etc).
